Crypto Rug Muncher
The Ministry of Propaganda is live.

To broaden our reach and deepen our coverage in crypto, we’re launching additional social channels— YouTube, Twitch, Kick, and Rumble—where we’ll host broadcasts focused on educating the community about scams in the space.

Alongside our regular AMAs, we’ll expand programming to include:

• News and updates from across the crypto space
• Breakdowns of current and ongoing scams
• Guest interviews and expert insights
• Project news, roadmap milestones, and community updates

Scheduling update:

• Next week’s AMA will take place on X as planned.
• Going forward, AMAs and broadcasts will run consecutively across all platforms: X, YouTube, Twitch, Kick, and Rumble.

Please give us a follow on these platforms as we attempt to inform, protect, and build with the community.

Kick: https://kick.com/cryptorugmunch
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/cryptorugmunch/
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@CryptoRugMuncher
Rumble: https://rumble.com/c/c-7786852/

$CRM $cryptorugmunch

03:42
Crypto Rug Muncher
How do you make a token unruggable? Remove the middlemen—no pay-to-play KOLs, no insider allocations—and put ownership in the hands of the community. That’s the vision behind $CRM.

Since launch, I haven’t sold a single token; I’ve only added to my holdings. I’m here as a community member, just like you.

By putting supply and governance in the community’s hands, we’re building resilience that can’t be pulled from holders—by me or anyone else. And we’re going further: working to develop tools and apps to make rug pulls harder across the entire crypto ecosystem, not just for our token.

If this vision resonates, consider joining us.

$CRM - $cryptorugmunch

20:12
Shmeker
In reply to this message
I just give the ai a theme at the beginning if you could say so
20:14
I give it a story in this case „the crm detective“ and ask the ai if it understood the premise and meaning an theeme of the coin and the intention behind the hera as a character
❤
RV
20:15
Once ai approves it, you can start by giving it signature elements you always want to keep
20:15
In this case the emblem on the chest and the hat, glasses etc
20:16
After that you tell the ai to always keep the defined characteristics in mind when creating new images
20:16
And now you can let your creativity flow😁 hope this helps
20:17
bonus tipp: you can upload a pic of a hero or fictional figure, and tell them to draw inspiration from there, but dont use specific names cuz of copyright

cuzbillybob
In reply to this message
You can also recreate images in the same style by uploading one to GPT and asking for the JSON code. It’s an easy way to keep visuals consistent—just change the details while the look stays the same. Based on that code, new images will be generated within the chat using the exact same style.
❤

Crypto Rug Muncher
Alright folks — I’ve submitted a Dexscreener Community Takeover to sync our website and socials for $CRM. The website isn’t finished yet, so we’ve put up a placeholder to keep things legit and reduce confusion. I’ve also added links to our official communities on X and Telegram as well as YouTube, Twitch, and Kick so people can find us easily. Dexscreener’s ETA is about 12 hours for review—if anything changes, I’ll keep you posted.

01:13
Crypto Rug Muncher
Streaming is the new meta in creator coins, and $CRM - $cryptorugmunch aren't just along for the ride—we’re taking the lead.

This week, I launched our official channels on YouTube, Kick, Twitch, and Rumble. Over the next few days, I’ll be stress‑testing each platform. Once everything’s dialed in, we’ll go beyond weekly AMAs on X and roll out regular, concurrent live broadcasts across all platforms featuring:

• Fast, no-hype crypto news roundups
• Deep dives into ongoing scams and scammers
• Guest interviews from across the space
• Live, listener‑requested project analysis

Why this matters: more reach, more discoverability, more eyes on $CRM and $cryptorugmunch, plus consistent education and transparency for the community.

If you can, please follow the channels below and turn on notifications. See you in chat.

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@CryptoRugMuncher
Kick: https://kick.com/cryptorugmunch
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/cryptorugmunch
Rumble: https://rumble.com/c/c-7786852

Crypto Rug Muncher
Creator tokens are surging—but $CRM and $cryptorugmunch were early and builder‑led from day one. We’re 20 days ahead of the meta, and our chart has held steady with consistent support and healthy price action.

What sets us apart:

• Real creator involvement from @CryptoRugMunch: launched under a trusted, recognized name that’s worked for the community since day one—not a slap‑on endorsement from someone who’s rugged before.
• 50% fees to product: first to commit half of trading fees to building a next‑gen scam‑detection app for degens.
• From token to company: first to use trading fees to form an LLC—bringing accountability and long‑term vision to the project.
• Education and protection at the core: we’re here to equip the community with the tools to succeed in crypto—not farm it.

We’re a project of firsts—and we plan to lead this meta. Skip the hype. Join builder‑driven tokens that are creating something bigger than a personality and building on behalf of the community. Buy, hold and trade $CRM and $cryptorugmunch with confidence.

https://x.com/BunnyFuFuu/status/1967287529335586921

08:27
Crypto Rug Muncher
$CRM and $cryptorugmunch holders:

We’re a small, community‑run microcap looking to build security tools to protect degens in crypto. There’s no big money or KOL cavalry coming—we are the cavalry.

How we win:

• Community first. This is a community‑run project, and our growth depends on you.
• Go full guerrilla mode. We’re relying on guerrilla marketing—constant, grassroots outreach to spread the word.
• Amplify everywhere. When you see a post where our project fits, drop $CRM and $cryptorugmunch, and tag @CryptoRugMunch so I can boost it.
• I’m doubling down too. In the coming weeks, I'll be living on X, scouting for content to raid, and amplifying community efforts. I’ll be on the lookout nonstop; be ready to raid.
• Step away from the chart. Weekend lulls happen—don’t slip into doomerism.
• Plug into our social hubs and stay active:
• Telegram: https://t.me/cryptorugmuncher
• X Community: https://x.com/i/communities/1810861050146750563

We win by outworking and out‑sharing. Bring the energy, recruit new holders, and be the pump this community‑built project deserves.

When you’re done getting rugged by these so‑called creators, consider $CRM and $cryptorugmunch. We’re one of the first creator coins actually building for the community—shipping security tools to help protect degens from scams and influencer pump‑and‑dumps.

Sick of scams in the crypto space? Get involved with a project working to stop them.

02:30
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why didn’t I hype $CRM at launch? Simple: early hype invites snipers and insiders to farm the community. The fewer who knew, the fewer could game the drop.

Look at Alex Becker’s $StrSzn as an example. Snipers/insiders ate, exited, and his community held the bag. We wanted the opposite: a fairer launch with fewer extractive players. That’s why I kept my launch quiet.

If you want a project doing it the right way—builder‑first, community‑protective, and focused on real utility—choose $CRM.
❤ 12 🔥 4 👏 2 👍 1

$

$CRM Chat
raid https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1967672652455350528
C
02:59
Crypto Rug Muncher
Why will $CRM win? Because the market’s waking up. Hype coins like $StrSzn extract fast and leave communities holding the bag. Creators will keep launching them—but holders are getting smarter and want purpose, not pump.

That’s where $CRM comes in. We’re builder‑first:

• 50% of Bags.FM trading fees fund a next‑gen security toolkit for degens.
• We formed a Wyoming LLC to execute responsibly and ship faster.
• We publish ongoing scam coverage to protect the space as well as consistently keep eyes on our project.

Value flows back through education, useful tools, and transparency. As the noise fades, utility will win. $CRM is built for that moment. Join the side that builds.

03:27
Crypto Rug Muncher
It’s tough to stay upbeat when price action is slow—but zoom out and look at what’s working for $CRM:

• Three weeks live with a steady market cap. In a choppy market, holding ground and staying alive is a win.
• Community is strong: 1,200+ holders after an intentionally low‑key launch. We’ll keep expanding with focused outreach and collabs as the project grows.
• Volume is light—but we have the advantage most tokens don’t: an audience and a mission. With coordinated campaigns, content drops, and incentive-driven pushes, we can and will turn organic reach into real volume.
• Formalized and transparent: we filed a Wyoming LLC to execute responsibly, partner professionally, and ship faster.
• Discovery is real: $CRM has pretty consistently trended top 5 on Bags.FM since launch. We have fell off a bit in recent days, but we will be back.
• Multi-platform presence: official channels on YouTube, Twitch, Kick, and Rumble to keep the stream meta going and funnel new eyes into the project. We aim to be one of the first true multi-platform creator-coin projects.

This is the foundation you want when the cycle turns—real community, real visibility, and a real plan of action. If you’re here, lean in: join the AMAs and streams, share updates, bring one more holder, and help us push. Let’s build with intent, stay optimistic, and prove what the $CRM community can do together.
❤ 13 👍 3

Shmeker
Yes, keep cool, moving prices are normal. Crypto space was red everywhere yesterday. Today is the fed decision to cut rates, so expect volatility all over the markets

We as a community already proofed we are in it for the long run, dont expect to make 100x in a few days!


Now is the time to accumulate, if you track the wallets - you can see the paper hands are gettin shaken out - some of them may just be dumb with trading i guess 🤣

The fact that our chart looks as healthy as it does speaks volumes… speaking of volume - thats the only small pain point, but with the coming exposure this will be no issue in no time!
So lets keep on movin and share the project! Hold through september, october is about to be spectacular!
15:06
Also, thanks to dev and mods for the Work behind the scenes!
I encourage each an every one of you to keep postin on twitter or at least retweet or repost content - we got about 100 people in here chronically online… lets show that on social media too!

For the first time, I’ll host directly from my main account: @CryptoRugMunch (not the community page).

• Project updates: $CRM and $cryptorugmunch
• Wallet hygiene 101: practical tips to stay safe
• Live Q&A

Four weeks approaching, gratitude overflowing. Thank you, $CRM community, for the consistent support, the ~$400k market cap base, and the nonstop word-of-mouth about the project. Most creator coins don’t last this long—we’re here because of you. Onward!

01:46
Crypto Rug Muncher
The likely fate of most creator coins? $Bagwork. They’re fueled by attention, not utility, so dev antics must get louder and more annoying to keep engagement. Eventually people tire of it, and the market reprices accordingly. No plan, no product—just vibes and fee extraction from the community.

Prefer substance over spectacle? Join $CRM. 50% of trading fees fund security tools for degens. Back a creator with a plan. Back a community-first build. Back $CRM.

CA: Eme5T2s2HB7B8W4YgLG1eReQpnadEVUnQBRjaKTdBAGS

They make money off from all of us by shilling Memecoins where they hold a significant bag and when retail buys in because of their shill they take out their bags and often leave you with nothing. From their 50 calls per week 1 or 2 perform well and then they tell you they are the gods of crypto. I am so fed up with all of them. That's why I am here! $CRM is a fair coin - the only low market fair coin with a good dev and promising community out there. 07:06
$CRM Chat
In reply to this message
Thank you for the interest gentlemen. Here’s how we’re funding and building $CRM.

Funding model

• Revenue source: User fees via BagsApp.
• Allocation: 50% of all trading fees are dedicated to building security tools. This is our core flywheel—more usage → more fees → faster product development.

Product vision (initial feature set)

• KOL tracking across projects to spot coordinated activity and influence.
• New-wallet intelligence to surface fresh wallets entering a project.
• Bundle detection to identify linked trades and potential wash/pump patterns.
• Fraud graphing and wallet labeling across projects for clearer risk mapping.
• Integrations with existing security tools so users get a unified, actionable dashboard.
• Additional features will be added based on data and community feedback; these are the baseline commitments.

Execution plan and timeline

•Phase 1 (now): Establish foundations—finish website, core docs, and listings where it matters.
•Phase 2 (Q4 target): Hire a small dev team funded by trading fees; build MVP modules and open community beta by end of Q4.
•Ongoing: Share regular previews, progress updates, and solicit feedback for rapid iteration.

Current challenge and approach

• We’ve had a healthy tension between two priorities: pushing volume/marketing vs. finishing the website and core materials.
• Resolution: Time-boxed, parallel tracks—ship the website and docs to completion while running lean, targeted awareness campaigns. The goal is to avoid “marketing into a void” and ensure newcomers land on credible, complete materials.

Commitments to investors and community

• No insiders, no KOL allocations, no bundling; transparent tokenomics.
• 50% of fees permanently directed to product development and security tooling.
• Frequent progress updates, milestone reporting, and public roadmap adjustments based on measurable outcomes.

What success looks like

• A security-first toolset that helps degens navigate safely.
• Growing fee revenue funding a sustainable development cycle.
• Community-led governance on feature priorities as we scale.
❤
p
c

08:51
Crypto Rug Muncher
$CRM / $cryptorugmunch — AMA Summary

Missed the AMA? A full recording is available at the link below. For a quick read, here are the key takeaways:

1. Company and Compliance

• Our LLC, Rug Munch Media, is officially registered in Wyoming.
• Our business mailing address is active.
• We’ve been assigned an EIN by the IRS. This formalizes our business operations and allows us to take on staff.

2. Content and Streaming Expansion

• We launched official channels on YouTube, Kick, Twitch, and Rumble.
• Plan: expand AMAs to these platforms and host multiple weekly streams covering:
• Crypto news and market updates
• Ongoing scams/scammers
• Live analysis of viewer‑requested projects
Goal: cement a consistent presence in the streaming/creator‑coin meta and keep the conversation around $CRM active.

3. Dexscreener Update

• $CRM now has updated links to our official socials and a temporary placeholder website on Dexscreener.

4. Website Progress and Priorities

• Website will be delivered in three phases: initial design → coding → animations.
• It’s a quality build and being funded piecemeal.
• Current trade‑off: allocating limited funds between marketing/volume and site development has slowed the site slightly.
• Mitigation: a placeholder site is live for now; while not ideal, the full site remains a near‑term priority and will be shipped as a major milestone.

5. Community Involvement

• We’re a community project. Organic amplification reduces the need for paid marketing.
• Ask: help share updates, attend streams, and invite new members—your push meaningfully extends our runway.

6. Security Education

• We covered wallet safety best practices and practical tips for staying safe while trading.
If you’re short on time, skip to the last 30 minutes of the recording for the security segment.

Next AMA

• Tuesday, September 23rd at 5 PM CST.
• Topic will be announced tomorrow.
• We look forward to meeting more community members—see you there!

https://x.com/CryptoRugMunch/status/1968074039127314885
